title: World Of Science Moon Dig Kit
features: Create, dig and explore: Ignite your child's imagination with our collection sets provides hand-on educational science activity set, where science meets excitement for hours of endless fun!
Interactive Experience: Including everything you need for hours on end for adventure and educational fun!
Spark Curiosity and Imagination: Encourages a love for science and exploration while fostering creativity and imaginative play, helping children develop skills and interest in this fun science game.

User-Friendly Instructions: The guide included helps children navigate their exploration, providing clues and facts of what they need to do and making the learning process both informative and enjoyable.
Ideal Gift: Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or any occasion. Recommended for children 6+.
description: Product Description Great for Gifting A perfect gift for any occasion from birthdays to christmas. Captivate and engage kids with a kit that encourages an interest in the world around them Screen Free Get practical and encourage kids to get stuck in and hands on with science kits full of real life science experiments to try out at home STEAM Learning Introduce kids to the worlds of science, technology, engineering, arts and mathematics; spark an natural interest in the world of education Discover through Play Encourage children to learn through play and exploration with kits designed to make learning fun! Develop problem solving and creative thinking World of Science Previous page Super Slimes Dive into the gooey sticky world of slime with 6 experiments & activities to complete. Unleash your inner mad scientist with glowing slime, putty, farting slime and even slime that grows! Super Magical Potions Become a sorcerer supreme with 7 magical potions to test your wizarding skills. Mix up all kinds of mysterious potions. Explore colour changing, magic fizzing, bottled rainbows and more! Potions Secret Spy Step into the role of a super secret agent spy! Complete 9 top secret missions. Will your disguise fool the enemy? Explore forensics with dusting for prints, invisible messages and more! Spy Natural Disasters Learn about the world around you and explore how natural disasters occur! Complete 8 thrilling experiments to see mini versions of real-world natural phenomenons so you can take a look up close! Disasters Growing Crystals Unleash your inner geologist and explore the world of crystals! Try growing different types of crystals learn about how they're made, and create a mystical scene complete with a crystal dinosaur! Crystals Glow in the Dark Explore all things glow! Try six different experiments and different ways to make things glow in the dark from slime, to crystals, ghostly hand experiments and more - learn all about phosphorescence Glow Next page Collect every kit to complete the magnet map puzzle!
